title: SO GREEN!
content:
I want to see the colors so bad so I decided to detached the old CRT monitor from the server and plugged it to the Dell. After the page is loaded, my brain screamed ...

 **GOD, IT'S SO GREEN!!!**

Yes, so green. So very green I'm afraid people will think that I'm running an environmental web site. :P

 %(me)FYI: It looks darker (more saturate) on the Dell. Look best on iBook. :)%
